step_by_step_thinking:
Gingiva is most commonly associated with deficiencies of Vitamin C due to conditions like scurvy, which leads to symptoms such as bleeding gums and gingival inflammation.
\boxed{C} Based on the evidence showing the critical role of Vitamin C in maintaining gum health and preventing conditions like scurvy, which manifests through issues such as bleeding and inflamed gums, I conclude that Vitamin C deficiency is most closely linked to gingival problems.
